prerequisites: A Segment workspace. Each workspace requires its own Public API token, so identify the workspace whose data you want to extract.
An account with the Workspace Owner role in that workspace. Only Workspace Owners can create a Public API token.
Know your workspace region (US or EU). The region config field selects the correct Public API base URL (US: https://api.segmentapis.com, EU: https://eu1.api.segmentapis.com).
A start_date value to bound the extraction window.

authMethods.name: Public API token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the Segment Public API using the api_token secret field. The token is sent as an HTTP Authorization: Bearer header. Tokens are created in the Segment app under Settings > Access Management > Tokens by a user with the Workspace Owner role; choose a Public API token (not a Config API token).

setupSteps.title: Create a Public API token in Segment
setupSteps.body: Log in to the Segment app and select the workspace you want to extract from. Go to Settings > Access Management > Tokens and click + Create Token. Enter a description, assign the token's access level (Workspace Owner or Workspace Member), and click Create. You must have the Workspace Owner role to create the token. Once generated, store the token somewhere safe, such as a password store or other secrets manager.

setupSteps.title: Set the api_token field
setupSteps.body: Paste the Public API token into the connector's api_token field. This is the secret credential the connector sends as Authorization: Bearer <token> on every request to the Segment Public API.

setupSteps.title: Select the region
setupSteps.body: Set the region field to match your Segment workspace location. US workspaces use the base URL https://api.segmentapis.com and EU workspaces use https://eu1.api.segmentapis.com. The Public API is accessible to both US and EU based workspaces.

setupSteps.title: Set the start_date
setupSteps.body: Provide the start_date field to define the earliest point from which the connector should pull data.

setupSteps.title: Verify connectivity
setupSteps.body: Confirm the token works by issuing an authenticated request against the regional base URL, for example: curl --request GET --url https://api.segmentapis.com/ --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN". The Segment Public API only accepts requests over HTTPS (port 443) using HTTP 1.1 or HTTP 2.
